title: stachys spinulosa subsp. milanii
intro: Stachys spinulosa subsp. milanii, also known as Milan's hedgehog tongue, is a plant species belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. Stachys spinulosa subsp. milanii is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
